name: Minted Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the potatoes, scallions, and parsley.
2. Whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, mint, salt, and pepper in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the dressing over the potato mixture and toss until everything is evenly coated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to chill.
5. Serve chilled alongside griddle-baked pitas.
Variation: For a Minted Cabbage Salad, substitute shredded cabbage for an additional 6 cups of potatoes and add 1 clove of crushed garlic to the dressing ingredients. Blend the garlic with the rest of the dressing components before tossing with the cabbage.
